scripts.dev: concurrently --restart-tries 5 --restart-after 2000 -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix musa_backend" "npm run dev --prefix musa_frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix musa_backend && npm install --prefix musa_frontend
scripts.build: npm install --prefix musa_backend && npm install --include=dev --prefix musa_frontend && npm run build --prefix musa_frontend
